item.title: These are the wrong lessons to take from Platner and Paxton’s successes
item.description: Politics ain’t beanbag. But character still matters.

item.title: Think you can see the future? Learn from Lewis and Clark’s rocky expedition.
item.description: 220 years ago, they didn’t know what to expect. Neither do we.

item.title: With a ban, Canada joins the latest social media fad
item.description: The harms to children are real, but government-imposed age restrictions aren't working.

item.title: Bye-bye, Democrats. No way, MAGA. Where can a centrist turn?
item.description: Polarization, student absenteeism, picket fences and ‘Shear Madness,' in readers’ eyes.

item.title: Graham Platner and the Trumpification of the Democratic Party
item.description: Civic virtue, domestic violence and Raymond Berry, in readers’ eyes.
